title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: STAR CENTER CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations, and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides on-site and off-site therapy/counseling referrals, safety planning, advocacy services, and community training. 182 SW 10th Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 suspected to be victims of all types of abuse and domestic violence or neglect Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 243-9044 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 243-9044 Main phone Main phone (541) 243-9044 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of age, proof of custody if needed AREA SERVED: Malheur County Services: Child Abuse Counseling Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers Therapy Referrals * Child Abuse Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. STAR CENTER
